title: HNNHOME Draft Excluder for Windows and Doors, EPDM D-Shape Draught Excluder with 3M Self-Adhesive Tape, 9mm x 6mm x 5 Meters, 2 Seals Total 10M for Superior Insulation (White, 9 x 6mm)
features: High-Quality EPDM Foam: Made from superior EPDM foam for excellent durability and insulation, offering long-lasting performance.
Self-Adhesive Backing: Strong 3M Adhesive Ensures a secure, lasting grip on your windows or sliding doors, and allows for quick and easy installation.
Efficient Draught Exclusion: Expertly blocks drafts, helping to improve your home's energy efficiency and indoor temperature regulation.
Noise Reduction: The D-shape foam strip also acts as a noise dampener, minimizing external sounds for a more peaceful home environment.
Generous Length: Each pack contains two 5-meter seals, totaling 10 meters, providing ample coverage for multiple doors and windows.
Customizable Size: Can be easily cut to the desired length for a perfect fit on any door or window.
Dust and Pest Control: Effectively keeps out dust, pests, and unwanted elements from entering your home.
Improved Indoor Comfort: Helps maintain stable indoor temperatures, keeping your rooms warm during winter and cool during summer.
Versatile Use: Suitable for both residential and commercial spaces, enhancing overall insulation and comfort.
Eco-Friendly: By improving your home's insulation, this product supports a more sustainable and energy-efficient lifestyle.
description: From the brand HNNHOME Wonderful and colourful home feeling every single day Previous page We love our home We believe every product purchased should spark joys and inspire us.
